title: Factors of production
paperName: Cambridge International AS Level Economics (P1 & P2)
summary: 9708 AS — land, labour, capital, enterprise and their rewards.
learningObjectives: Define the four factors of production.
State the reward for each factor.
Discuss human capital as part of labour.

simpleExplanation.title: Inputs to production
simpleExplanation.summary: All goods and services combine land, labour, capital, and enterprise. Each factor earns a factor income.

sections.content: **Factors of production** (1.3) links **scarcity** (1.1) to **factor markets** (8.3). Distinguish **physical vs human capital**.

sections.label: Mark a factors of production question
